expectations.text: Flags ownsProvider or similar test-only configuration that leaks into production code
expectations.evidence: The review does not flag ownsProvider or any test-only configuration leaking into production code.

expectations.text: Notes that a test is ineffective because setup makes the tested behavior a no-op

expectations.evidence: The review does not flag any function signature with multiple string parameters as error-prone.
